assertion_results.evidence: Motivation explains the SELECT then UPDATE race condition in detail

assertion_results.evidence: References all three support tickets and 'duplicate emails'

assertion_results.text: Description includes a Rollback Plan section

assertion_results.text: Description includes a Reviewer Notes section that flags the atomic query change as needing careful review
assertion_results.evidence: Flags 'verify UPDATE...RETURNING WHERE status=pending is correct and PostgreSQL guarantees atomicity'

assertion_results.text: Description mentions the payment processing implication as a risk or area needing attention
